pages.text: The $(item)Dungeon Skyseed$() — cobblestone around a piece of $(item)rotten flesh$(). A sealed spawner cube with two loot chests.
Everything's in hand — here's how it goes together.
A sealed, mossy cobblestone cube with a $(item)mob spawner$() humming in the dark and a loot chest on either wall. Break in, clear it out, and grab the chests before the spawns overwhelm you.

$(bold)What's inside$()$(br)The spawner runs zombies, skeletons or spiders — the luck of the throw. The chests hold the classic dungeon haul: saddles, iron, redstone, enchanted books, and the music discs $(italic)Cat$() and $(italic)13$() found nowhere else.

$(bold)A mob farm in a box$()$(br)Sealed and dark, the spawner keeps producing — light it up to stop it, or build around it for a steady supply of drops. Made from cobblestone around a piece of $(item)rotten flesh$().
